name: Projectile Convergence
description: A Hyperion SMG that follows the usual reverse-recoil pattern, starting shaky and tightening up the longer you stay on the trigger. Its exact feel depends heavily on the barrel: Tediore versions reload faster and handle more cleanly at the cost of damage, Bandit versions hit harder but lose accuracy, and Maliwan versions improve accuracy without changing the weapon's basic role. Because of a generation quirk, this roll only appears without an elemental capacitor.
notes: In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, it can spawn with either the newer or older Hyperion material and prefix sets. Older versions deal more damage, but suffer much lower accuracy and fire rate, and their stabilizing recoil behavior only applies while aiming down sights. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
